en.value:
-Conduct a baseline study and situation analysis

	-Establish the Korak Development Planning Committee.

	-Form 20 farmer groups, 6 irrigation committees, 6 road user committees, 1 seed committee and 2 nursery committees.

	-Organize and conduct initial 3 one-week trainings for 60 leading members of SHGs in management, administration, good governance and leadership

	-Elaborate development and action plans with the Planning Committee and SHGs

	-Design and construct 2 community centers / organize management of community centers / link the centers with local authorities, service providers and the Learning Center Program of the Government.

	-Develop and construct with the farmer groups 4 new irrigation Systems. Rehabilitate 2 irrigation Systems.  Train irrigation committees.

	-Organize and conduct 18 Farmer Field Schools for 450 members of the farmer groups.

	-Organize special trainings for 180 farmers in organic vegetable farming, fruit cultivation and livestock raising.

	-Organize and conduct 7 five-days training in kitchen gardening for 140 households.

	-Establish on seed bank. Train 20 members of the seed committees 2-3 weeks in seed production and multiplication. Coordinate with DADO for seed certification.

	-Establish of cooperative (approx. 3000 members).

	-Organize and conduct workshops and trainings for 80 members of the cooperative in management, administration, credit and saving, marketing.

	-Conduct marketing analysis and value chain analysis for 2-3 products

	-Develop operational plans for the production, processing and marketing of these products.

	-Organize and conduct trainings in post harvesting, processing and marketing for 60 members of the cooperative.

	-Provide inputs for production, processing and marketing (material, tools, truck).

	-Design and construct a storage for the cooperative

	-Organize and conduct exposure/exchange programs for 90 cooperative members to successful organic farms, agricultural and NTPF business, etc.

	-Organize and conduct 2 years training program for 20 youths in organic farming (curriculum development, identification of resource persons, etc.)

	-Training of 40 leading members of the 8 forest user groups in sustainable forest management (development of forest use plan, marketing of NTFPs, sustainable use of forest resources, etc.).

	-Organize and establish 2 nurseries. Conduct training for 20 nursery committee members. Provide seedlings.

	-Organize the reforestation of 125 ha deforested / damaged forest land

en.full: Integrated rural development and nature conservation in the mountainous regions of Chitwan District

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
